subcodes.first_line: O Báqir! Bear thou witness unto that which God Himself hath testified: that there is no God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Grieve not over this world and its affairs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا باقر ان اشهد بما شهد الله انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم لا تحزن من الدنیا و شئوناتها
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
